chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI ITRAs No.253 & 254 of 2011 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Hearing of case For hearing of main case 12.11.2024 M/s. Anwar Kashif Mumtaz & Usman Alam, Advocates for the Respondent ************ None present on behalf of the Applicant nor any intimation received. Through these Reference Applications, the Applicant Department has impugned a common order dated 23.07.2011, passed in ITA No.651/KB-2008 for assessment year 2001-2002 & ITA No.656/KB- 2008 for assessment year 2003, proposing various questions of law, including question that whether the learned Appellate Tribunal was justified in remanding the matter to the Assessing Officer for de novo consideration. We have perused the record as well as order of the Tribunal and are of the view that no prejudice has been caused to the Applicant inasmuch as after setting-aside the order of the Forum below, the matter has been remanded to the Assessing Officer for de novo consideration; therefore, in essence no question of law has arisen out of Order of the Tribunal; hence, both these Reference Applications are hereby dismissed along with pending application[s]. Office to place a copy of this order in connected matter. JUDGE JUDGE Qurban/PA*
